title: Manufacturing Engineer - Power Grid Corporation - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Power Grid Corporation - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Power Grid Corporation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Power Grid Corporation:
Power Grid Corporation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Power Grid Corporation!
